title: DarkRPG Reverse Dark Language
description: Restores the DarkRPG language text back to the vanilla language
body:
Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off!


 

Reverse Dark Language

Reverses the language used in the DarkRPG modpack back to default

 

Features

(Your vanilla experience will be further enhanced thanks to these features) 

This was built for the DarkRPG modpack and restores the vanilla language for the modpack for those who prefer to play using the vanilla language option.

 

Permission - Feel free to use in your modpacks but they have to be hosted on CurseForge only and link back to this page.

 

Click the banner below to get your server today! or go to BisectHosting.com  and make sure to use the code 'gamerpotion' to get your 25% off.
